PRINCESS ALICE: \"Once upon a time there: PRINCESS ALICE: "Once upon a time there was a lone castle in the Shadow Forest.
The lone castle that existed since the b: The lone castle that existed since the beginning of time, Castle Schwarz, hung on the edge of the world.
The Prince and Princess ruled their land: The Prince and Princess ruled their land from the top of the pinnacle of Castle Schwarz.
<ac>That peace and prosperity has been d: <ac>That peace and prosperity has been disrupted.
<ac>By the evil and nefarious Wolf King.
PRINCESS ALICE: \"With no one else to tu: PRINCESS ALICE: "With no one else to turn to, the Prince and Princess sink their hopes into their strongest soldier.
In hopes that peace can be restored once: In hopes that peace can be restored once again."
It seems that the story book is no longe: It seems that the story book is no longer here...
It's an old and dusty fairytale book cal: It's an old and dusty fairytale book called "The Wolf King".
\"Many hear of the legend of man who liv: "Many hear of the legend of man who lived on the mountaintops with wolves of passing legends.
Once upon this mountain was a giant cast: Once upon this mountain was a giant castle in black, and a giant castle in white.
The King and Queen had a grandson who fo: The King and Queen had a grandson who found himself akin to the dogs and beasts of the forest.
The man, beloved by all, would take upon: The man, beloved by all, would take upon the role of mastering two wolves handed to him by the royal family.
\"Hear ye!, Hear ye! At last! The Wolf K: "Hear ye!, Hear ye! At last! The Wolf King has been crowned!"
The village rejoiced and were jolly with: The village rejoiced and were jolly with the coronation of the Wolf King!
Though their jollies, with simply follie: Though their jollies, with simply follies would crumble the throne which held the Wolf King so high."
\"The Wolf King! The Wolf King! The man: "The Wolf King! The Wolf King! The man that tames beasts!"
Perhaps the cries and praise of the ones: Perhaps the cries and praise of the ones below faltered and altered the Wolf King's mind.
For during a ceremony, the Wolf King wou: For during a ceremony, the Wolf King would lose control of the Red Beast.
The Red devoured the men, the women, and: The Red devoured the men, the women, and all the children of the mountain.
All would hear \"The Wolf King!\" \"The: All would hear "The Wolf King!" "The Wolf King!" until he heard the cry of no more.
Alone in despair, the Wolf King had no s: Alone in despair, the Wolf King had no subjects. Eaten and devoured by the Red Beast.
The Wolf King and Blue Beast ravaged the: The Wolf King and Blue Beast ravaged the Red Beast for its sins.
Devoured the flesh of the Red Beast and: Devoured the flesh of the Red Beast and set its bones along the river, which grew as red as the beast itself.
The Wolf King and the Blue Beast wander: The Wolf King and the Blue Beast wander forever more."
The man was talented with the beasts, bu: The man was talented with the beasts, but even his talents had their limits.
It's an occult magazine that has a Pokém: It's an occult magazine that has a Pokémon that looks like \c[6]Gallade on the first page of the issue.
On further reading, it seems as though t: On further reading, it seems as though there's a Pokémon that looks like a robotic version of a \c[6]Hydreigon.
A violet book. It has the documentation: A violet book. It has the documentation of the survey of a certain giant crater.

Who knows how much time we have left tog: Who knows how much time we have left together...?

For defying your Princess...\\|\\n<i>Dea: For defying your Princess...\|\nDeath awaits you.
